title: scr1 test suite: built-in system functions only work when the return value is assigned

features.name: system_function_call_ignored_return
features.description: Code should include a call to a system function that returns a value where the return value is intentionally ignored (not assigned to a variable)

features.name: value_plusargs_system_function
features.description: Code should include a call to $value$plusargs system function used to retrieve parameter values from plusargs
